goal: 让 Catty dogfood health 暴露证据缺口

summary.title: 暴露 dogfood 证据缺口
summary.what: 给 Catty dogfood-health 只读 readiness 输出新增 evidenceGaps 字段，按 blocker 结构化列出缺少的证据、当前命令、安全边界、被上游 blocker 压住的依赖和后续 Pi judge 命令；同时补测试和 README 说明。
summary.why: 当前 live dogfood blocked 在 no_user_prior_candidates：低分 miss 全是 Stub/prediction-eval，已有 model 样本但没有 model-backed low-score miss，并且当前 live context 仍是 repeated-context。仅靠 blockers、stageSuppressions 和 prose 容易让后续 agent 把 Stub miss、trial heuristic 或下游 canary blocker 误当成可转正 memory/canary 证据；evidenceGaps 把真正缺的证据机器可读化。
summary.user_goal: 让 Catty dogfood health 暴露证据缺口

decisions.chose: 放进 dogfood-health 的 evidenceGaps JSON 字段。
decisions.rationale: dogfood-health 是长期推进 agent 每轮的只读定位入口；把缺证据原因放在同一个结果里，后续 agent 不需要从 blocker 文案和 summary 统计里拼读写入边界。

decisions.point: repeated-context 时的 evidence gap 命令
decisions.chose: 当 sampleGate 是 wait_for_context_switch 时，no_user_prior_candidates 的 evidence gap 使用 sampleGate 的 dry-run 命令，而不是 Pi write 命令。
decisions.rationale: 这样既说明缺 model-backed low-score miss，也不会诱导在同一 live context 上重复写 Pi sample。

decisions.point: 下游 canary blocker 如何表达
decisions.chose: 给 no_canary_plans / no_canary_queue 的 evidence gap 标出 dependsOn: no_user_prior_candidates。
decisions.rationale: 保留下游 readiness 事实，同时明确当前不能越过 user-prior candidate 门禁去写 canary。

decisions.point: 本轮是否推进采样、judge、canary 或 memory writer
decisions.chose: 不写样本、不调模型、不写 canary、不写用户 memory，只增强只读诊断输出。
decisions.rationale: live shadow 仍报告 repeated-context；当前最安全的推进方式是降低下一轮误操作和 memory admission 污染风险。

rejected.alternative: 直接写新的 Pi shadow sample
rejected.reason: bun src/catty/shadow.ts --limit 80 显示当前上下文已由 pred_mpn65un6_v83tq32i 采样，重复写样本会污染 dogfood。

rejected.alternative: 只继续依赖 memoryCandidateGate 和 stageSuppressions
rejected.reason: 它们分别表达候选阶段和依赖抑制，但没有把每个 blocker 缺的证据、命令和后续命令统一成可消费列表。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts，7 pass。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，81 pass。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均无输出。
live smoke 通过：bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts --compact --max 5 输出 evidenceGaps；当前 readiness=blocked，sampleGate.status=wait_for_context_switch，no_user_prior_candidates 缺 fresh context switch。
live shadow 通过：bun src/catty/shadow.ts --limit 80 仍为 repeated-context，latestPredictionId=pred_mpn65un6_v83tq32i。
runtime live status 通过：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 ok=true，launchd loaded=true，lastExitCode=0，diagnostics warnings=[]。
提交范围只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts、src/catty/dogfood-health.ts；CLAUDE.md 仍为无关 unstaged dirty，未 stage/commit。
Mainline preflight 的 dogfood-health overlaps 是同一 catty 分支上的顺序 readiness/candidate 诊断增强；本轮没有改变 shadow/judge/canary/accepted-memory 写入协议。

architectural_claims: dogfood-health remains a read-only dry-run overview and still does not write predictions, user memory, memory audit, canary state, receipts, heartbeat configuration, or model calls.
evidenceGaps makes blocker-to-evidence requirements machine-readable without changing blocker collection, sampling freshness, sampleGate, memoryCandidateGate, or stageSuppressions semantics.
Evidence gaps preserve upstream dependency information for suppressed downstream canary stages instead of hiding those blockers.
behavioral_changes: inspectCattyDogfoodHealth now returns evidenceGaps for every blocker.
ready_for_dogfood_review health returns an empty evidenceGaps array.

When model-backed low-score evidence is missing but live context is repeated, no_user_prior_candidates evidence gap points to bun src/catty/shadow.ts --limit 80 and records the Pi judge follow-up command.
Downstream no_canary_plans and no_canary_queue evidence gaps include dependsOn when suppressed by no_user_prior_candidates.
compact dogfood-health output includes evidenceGaps while still omitting stages and raw trail details.

api_changes.signature: bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts JSON output includes evidenceGaps

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json content are read or printed.
The new field is derived from existing dry-run health inputs and performs no writes or model calls.
The repeated-context path keeps the command read-only, reducing risk of duplicate Pi sampling.
migration_notes: Existing dogfood-health consumers remain compatible because evidenceGaps is an additive JSON field.
